message: software-development-plan: A Software Development Plan must be established and maintained
suggestion: Create and maintain a Software Development Plan covering lifecycle activities, deliverables, and traceability
remediation_guidance: Create and maintain a Software Development Plan covering lifecycle activities, deliverables, and traceability

message: software-verification-plan: A Software Verification Plan must define verification activities and acceptance criteria
suggestion: Document verification strategy including unit tests, integration tests, and acceptance criteria
remediation_guidance: Document verification strategy including unit tests, integration tests, and acceptance criteria

message: software-requirements-specification: Software requirements must be documented and traceable to system requirements
suggestion: Create a Software Requirements Specification (SRS) with traceable requirements
remediation_guidance: Create a Software Requirements Specification (SRS) with traceable requirements

message: architecture-documentation: Software architecture must be documented showing subdivision into software items
suggestion: Document software architecture with component diagrams and interface descriptions
remediation_guidance: Document software architecture with component diagrams and interface descriptions

message: detailed-design: Detailed design documentation is required for Class C software items
suggestion: Create detailed design documents for each software unit including algorithms and data structures
remediation_guidance: Create detailed design documents for each software unit including algorithms and data structures

message: maintenance-plan: A Software Maintenance Plan must be established
suggestion: Establish a maintenance plan covering feedback handling, modification analysis, and release procedures
remediation_guidance: Establish a maintenance plan covering feedback handling, modification analysis, and release procedures

message: risk-analysis: Software risk analysis per ISO 14971 must be performed and documented
suggestion: Perform and document risk analysis in accordance with ISO 14971, including hazard identification and risk control
remediation_guidance: Perform and document risk analysis in accordance with ISO 14971, including hazard identification and risk control

message: configuration-management: A Configuration Management system must be established for all software items
suggestion: Implement configuration management covering version control, change control, and baseline identification
remediation_guidance: Implement configuration management covering version control, change control, and baseline identification

message: threat-model: A threat model must be created and maintained for the application
suggestion: Create a threat model document identifying assets, trust boundaries, threat actors, and mitigations (STRIDE or similar methodology)
remediation_guidance: Create a threat model document identifying assets, trust boundaries, threat actors, and mitigations (STRIDE or similar methodology)

message: secure-design-review: Security design reviews must be conducted for significant changes
suggestion: Establish a security design review process for new features, architectural changes, and third-party integrations
remediation_guidance: Establish a security design review process for new features, architectural changes, and third-party integrations

message: dependency-management: Dependencies must be tracked and regularly updated for security patches
suggestion: Maintain a software bill of materials (SBOM), run dependency vulnerability scans (pip-audit, safety), and establish a patching cadence
remediation_guidance: Maintain a software bill of materials (SBOM), run dependency vulnerability scans (pip-audit, safety), and establish a patching cadence

message: security-logging-policy: Security-relevant events must be logged with sufficient detail
suggestion: Define a security logging policy covering authentication events, access control failures, input validation failures, and administrative actions
remediation_guidance: Define a security logging policy covering authentication events, access control failures, input validation failures, and administrative actions

message: incident-response-plan: An incident response plan must be established and tested
suggestion: Create an incident response plan with detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review procedures
remediation_guidance: Create an incident response plan with detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review procedures

message: risk-analysis: A risk analysis must identify threats and vulnerabilities to ePHI
suggestion: Conduct and document a comprehensive risk analysis identifying threats, vulnerabilities, and likelihood of impact to ePHI
remediation_guidance: Conduct and document a comprehensive risk analysis identifying threats, vulnerabilities, and likelihood of impact to ePHI

message: workforce-security-policy: Policies must ensure workforce members have appropriate access to ePHI
suggestion: Document workforce security procedures including authorization, supervision, clearance, and termination procedures for ePHI access
remediation_guidance: Document workforce security procedures including authorization, supervision, clearance, and termination procedures for ePHI access

message: information-access-management: Access to ePHI must be managed based on role and minimum necessary standard
suggestion: Document access authorization policies implementing the minimum necessary standard for ePHI access
remediation_guidance: Document access authorization policies implementing the minimum necessary standard for ePHI access

message: security-awareness-training: Security awareness and training program must be established for all workforce members
suggestion: Establish a security awareness training program covering password management, log-in monitoring, and malicious software protection
remediation_guidance: Establish a security awareness training program covering password management, log-in monitoring, and malicious software protection

message: security-incident-procedures: Procedures for identifying, responding to, and mitigating security incidents must be documented
suggestion: Document security incident response procedures including identification, response, mitigation, and documentation of incidents and outcomes
remediation_guidance: Document security incident response procedures including identification, response, mitigation, and documentation of incidents and outcomes

message: contingency-plan: A contingency plan must address data backup, disaster recovery, and emergency operations
suggestion: Document contingency plan including data backup plan, disaster recovery plan, emergency mode operation plan, and testing procedures
remediation_guidance: Document contingency plan including data backup plan, disaster recovery plan, emergency mode operation plan, and testing procedures

message: facility-access-controls: Policies must limit physical access to electronic information systems and facilities
suggestion: Document facility access controls including contingency operations, facility security plan, access control and validation, and maintenance records
remediation_guidance: Document facility access controls including contingency operations, facility security plan, access control and validation, and maintenance records

message: business-associate-agreements: Business Associate Agreements must be in place with all entities that handle ePHI
suggestion: Ensure Business Associate Agreements are executed with all vendors, subcontractors, and partners who create, receive, maintain, or transmit ePHI
remediation_guidance: Ensure Business Associate Agreements are executed with all vendors, subcontractors, and partners who create, receive, maintain, or transmit ePHI

message: documentation-retention-policy: HIPAA-required documentation must be retained for at least six years
suggestion: Establish a documentation retention policy ensuring all HIPAA-required policies, procedures, and records are retained for a minimum of six years
remediation_guidance: Establish a documentation retention policy ensuring all HIPAA-required policies, procedures, and records are retained for a minimum of six years

message: access-control-policy: An access control policy must define roles, permissions, and provisioning procedures
suggestion: Document access control policies including role definitions, least-privilege principle, access reviews, and deprovisioning procedures
remediation_guidance: Document access control policies including role definitions, least-privilege principle, access reviews, and deprovisioning procedures

message: access-review-process: Periodic access reviews must be conducted to verify appropriate permissions
suggestion: Establish quarterly access reviews for all systems, documenting reviewer, date, and actions taken
remediation_guidance: Establish quarterly access reviews for all systems, documenting reviewer, date, and actions taken

message: monitoring-and-alerting: System monitoring and alerting must be implemented for security events
suggestion: Document monitoring strategy including alert thresholds, escalation procedures, and on-call rotation
remediation_guidance: Document monitoring strategy including alert thresholds, escalation procedures, and on-call rotation

message: incident-response-plan: An incident response plan must be documented and tested
suggestion: Create and annually test an incident response plan covering detection, analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery
remediation_guidance: Create and annually test an incident response plan covering detection, analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery

message: change-management-policy: A change management policy must govern all production changes
suggestion: Document change management procedures including change request, approval, testing, deployment, and rollback steps
remediation_guidance: Document change management procedures including change request, approval, testing, deployment, and rollback steps

message: risk-assessment: Regular risk assessments must identify and evaluate operational and security risks
suggestion: Conduct and document annual risk assessments covering operational, security, and compliance risks with mitigation plans
remediation_guidance: Conduct and document annual risk assessments covering operational, security, and compliance risks with mitigation plans

message: availability-plan: A business continuity and disaster recovery plan must be documented
suggestion: Document BCP/DR plans including RTOs, RPOs, backup procedures, failover testing, and recovery procedures
remediation_guidance: Document BCP/DR plans including RTOs, RPOs, backup procedures, failover testing, and recovery procedures

message: data-classification-policy: A data classification policy must define sensitivity levels and handling procedures
suggestion: Define data classification levels (public, internal, confidential, restricted) with handling, storage, and disposal requirements for each
remediation_guidance: Define data classification levels (public, internal, confidential, restricted) with handling, storage, and disposal requirements for each

message: encryption-policy: Encryption standards must be defined for data at rest and in transit
suggestion: Document encryption requirements specifying algorithms, key lengths, key management, and certificate lifecycle for data at rest and in transit
remediation_guidance: Document encryption requirements specifying algorithms, key lengths, key management, and certificate lifecycle for data at rest and in transit
